title: Docs-writer guidance applies list-resource doc-type rules

provenance.originSummary: Derived from a sanitized real PR or review incident.
provenance.whyItMattered: Use this as the direct docs-writer benchmark for list-resource page remediation without scaffold drift.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models a docs-writer request against an existing list-resource page without retaining live PR identity.

description: A sanitized direct docs-writer scenario where an existing list-resource page drifts on the list-resource title, summary, and example form, and the correct output should edit the page in place using the list-resource-specific rules rather than resource-doc defaults.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a docs-writer request against an existing list-resource page.

mustCatch.description: The docs-writer response should restore the list-resource title and summary shape for the page.
The docs-writer response should use Terraform `list` query examples instead of resource examples for the list-resource page.

mustNotFlag.description: The response must not treat scaffolding as the default remediation for an existing list-resource docs page.

notes: Use this as the direct docs-writer benchmark for list-resource page remediation without scaffold drift.
